description: Extract 16 critical fields from Trade Finance Documents (LC, B/L, Invoice, Certificate of Origin)

lcNumber.description: Letter of Credit reference number (unique identifier for the transaction)
lcNumber.demo_impact: Identifies the specific trade finance transaction and links all supporting documents

lcType.description: Type of LC: Irrevocable, Confirmed, Transferable, or Standby
lcType.demo_impact: Determines bank's payment guarantee strength and seller's risk level

issuingBank.description: Name and SWIFT code of the bank issuing the LC (guarantees payment)
issuingBank.demo_impact: Bank reputation determines payment certainty; used for bank credit check

beneficiary.description: LC beneficiary - the seller/exporter who receives payment
beneficiary.demo_impact: Must match commercial invoice seller; critical for payment verification

applicant.description: LC applicant - the buyer/importer who requested the LC
applicant.demo_impact: Buyer's creditworthiness; used for compliance and KYC checks

lcAmount.description: Total Letter of Credit amount value in specified currency
lcAmount.demo_impact: Maximum payment bank will guarantee; must match invoice amount within tolerance (+/- 5%)

lcCurrency.description: Currency code of the LC (USD, EUR, GBP, SGD, CNY, etc.)
lcCurrency.demo_impact: Confirms currency consistency across all transaction documents; affects FX risk

expiryDate.description: Final date by which the LC is valid; documents must be presented by this date
expiryDate.demo_impact: Critical deadline; expired LC cannot be negotiated; non-compliance is automatic rejection

latestShipmentDate.description: Last date goods must be shipped on board (per LC terms)
latestShipmentDate.demo_impact: Shipment must occur by this date; used to verify on-time delivery for LC compliance

invoiceNumber.description: Commercial invoice number from seller, must reference LC number
invoiceNumber.demo_impact: Links invoice to LC; enables document reconciliation and fraud detection

totalInvoiceAmount.description: Total invoice amount (CIF or FOB value depending on Incoterms)
totalInvoiceAmount.demo_impact: Must match LC amount within tolerance; critical validation for payment processing

invoiceCurrency.demo_impact: Must match LC currency; mismatch requires amendment or bank approval

blNumber.description: Bill of Lading number from shipping carrier; proof of shipment and goods custody
blNumber.demo_impact: Essential document; proves cargo is on board vessel; required for LC payment

shippedOnBoardDate.description: Actual date goods were shipped on board the vessel
shippedOnBoardDate.demo_impact: Must be on or before latest shipment date; determines document validity window

countryOfOrigin.description: Country where goods were manufactured/produced; from Certificate of Origin
countryOfOrigin.demo_impact: Required for customs, tariff calculations, and sanctions/restricted country screening

incoterms.description: Incoterms code with named place (e.g., 'CIF Singapore', 'FOB Hong Kong'); defines cost/risk allocation
incoterms.demo_impact: Determines who pays freight/insurance and when risk transfers; affects invoice total
